data.title: docs/reference/AGENT_POINT_SESSION.md has pre-existing portability violations blocking rename commit
data.description: The file docs/reference/AGENT_POINT_SESSION.md contains 21 lines with hardcoded /home/user/digital-service-orchestra/ paths from captured Linux session data. These trigger the check-portability.sh pre-commit hook, preventing commits that stage this file. The file's using-lockpick → using-dso rename (from epic dso-khl2/task 721c-64c1) was committed without this file as a workaround. Fix: either exclude docs/reference/ from the portability check (since session logs inherently contain absolute paths), or clean up the hardcoded paths in the file.
